items.label: Official packet pages
items.guidance: Reviewed representative packets route users to the on-page PDF viewer.

items.label: Packet candidates needing review
items.guidance: Candidate packet links stay out of public action until source fit and packet mapping are reviewed.

items.label: Approved official PDFs
items.guidance: Approved PDF actions open in the on-page viewer and download through approved same-origin court-source delivery. Cached copies remain disabled.

items.label: County sources without packet review
items.guidance: Monitored county sources without packet-level review should use Guided Intake instead of sending visitors to an unreviewed packet path.

items.label: MFLG calculators
items.guidance: Child-support and spousal-maintenance calculators are available on this page for planning, with official-source fallback.

public_message: Approved PDFs open and download on site through approved court-source delivery. MFLG calculators are available on site. Review-only packet candidates, non-reviewed county packets, and cached copies remain controlled.
